name: cbm
description: Codebase Memory MCP analyzer that extracts semantic graphs from source code, mapping code structures to architecture model elements
notes: Codebase Memory is an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that provides semantic graph extraction for multiple programming languages. It performs static analysis to identify code structures (functions, classes, modules, routes) and their relationships (calls, dependencies, inheritance, etc.), enabling mapping to Documentation Robotics architecture model elements.
